# UC-22.10.58 · HIPAA 164.312(b) — Endpoint Posture Compliance Evidence on Healthcare Endpoints

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence HIPAA 164.312(b) — posture compliance for healthcare endpoints accessing PHI. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence HIPAA 164.312(b) — posture compliance for healthcare endpoints accessing PHI-bearing networks.

## Value

HIPAA requires audit controls over PHI-access endpoints. Posture compliance per ISE is the technical control; this UC produces evidence of its operation.

## Implementation

Daily.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with HIPAA 164.312(b) tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Healthcare endpoint fails posture. Evidence captured.

### Negative scenario

All healthcare endpoints compliant. Empty result; control attested.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.21 + UC-17.1.53 operational.
- `healthcare_endpoint_inventory.csv` maintained.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.10.58: HIPAA — Posture Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.10.58,reg=HIPAA,clause=164.312(b)
```

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (80001, 80002, 80003) earliest=-1d
| lookup healthcare_endpoint_inventory.csv endpoint_mac OUTPUT phi_relevant
| where phi_relevant="yes"
| stats count by posture_status, MessageCode
| eval hipaa_clause="164.312(b)", control="Posture_Compliance"
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

HIPAA posture compliance panel; non-compliant healthcare endpoints table.

## Known False Positives

1. Posture-grace-period endpoints — annotate with grace expiry.
